raw_consumer_statement: I am disputing charges made to my CitiBank Best Buy Account on XX/XX/year>. I was attending a XXXX  dinner for my job on XX/XX/year>, as soon I as got home I checked my email and saw charges made on my Best Buy account that were fraud. I immediately that night on XX/XX/XXXX contacted Citibank to report the charges. The XXXX charges were for digital purchases. XXXX charge was for {$100.00} and the second charge was for {$150.00}, totaling {$250.00}. A case was opened with the Best Buy/Citibank fraud department . Since then, Ctitbanks fraud department has sent me a letter that their investigation was complete and that I am responsible for the charges. I have been spending months fighting and disputing this. They keep stating that since my email was used it is my responsibility to pay, However my email account, gmail was hacked. I received hundreds of emails on XX/XX/XXXX from all different companies with attempted charges and security code requests. I have stated this several times to Best Buy/Citibank with no help or resolutions on their end. I am a responsible individual and work in XXXX, my credit is in good standing with all my accounts and I do not want this fraud to affect my credit. I am now getting calls from Citibank, interest fees and late fees added to this fraud activity.
